positive: Stylized minimal silhouette of a whimsical forest scene at dawn. Central focus on interconnected elements: glowing mushrooms forming gentle arbors, stylized deer drinking from a crystalline pond, and abstract woodland foliage catching the first rays of sunlight. The overall mood is serene and magical. Use a high-contrast, two-tone palette (deep forest green, dusty indigo, and ethereal pale gold accents). Clean, graphic vector art style with strong black outlines and flat, saturated color blocking. Composition must be centered and scalable for apparel print, with generous negative space surrounding the subject matter. Vector illustration, clean lines, high resolution, art deco influence, graphic novel feel.
negative: photorealistic, blur, noise, artifacts, text, watermark, logo, signature, extra limbs, bad anatomy, muddy colors, gradient wash, grainy, messy details, low resolution
